What We Do

Electrical Services
You Can Rely On

From small domestic jobs to full commercial installations, Williams Electrical handles it all with precision and care.

Consumer Unit Upgrades

Old or unsafe fuse boards replaced with modern consumer units. Fully certified and compliant with current regulations.

Full & Partial Rewires

Complete rewiring solutions for older properties or extensions. Professionally installed with minimal disruption to your home.

EV Charger Installation

Home EV charging point installation. Compatible with all major manufacturers, OZEV-approved where applicable.

Fault Finding & Repairs

Tripping circuits, partial power loss, flickering lights — we diagnose and fix electrical faults quickly and safely.

New Sockets & Lighting

Additional sockets, USB outlets, recessed downlights, smart lighting systems and outdoor lighting solutions.

EICR & Certificates

Electrical Installation Condition Reports for landlords, homeowners and property sales. Fast turnaround.

Solar & Battery Storage

Solar panel electrical connection, battery storage installation and integration with your existing system.

Commercial Electrical

Office fit-outs, retail lighting, industrial wiring and periodic inspections. Reliable commercial work at competitive rates.

How It Works

Simple 4-Step Process

Getting your electrical work done with Williams Electrical is straightforward from start to finish.

Get In Touch

Call, WhatsApp or fill in our contact form. We respond fast — usually within a few hours.

2

Free Quote

Alfie assesses the job and provides a clear, fixed quote with no obligation and no hidden costs.

3

Book a Date

We arrange a date that suits you. Flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends.

4

Job Done Right

Work completed to the highest standard, certified and signed off. Tidy site left behind.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions from our customers — answered honestly.

Are you fully qualified and insured?
Yes. All work is carried out by a fully qualified electrician and is compliant with BS 7671 (18th Edition Wiring Regulations). We are fully insured for domestic and commercial work and can provide certification for all notifiable work.
Do you charge a call-out fee?
No. We do not charge a call-out fee for quotes. You only pay for the work carried out. Emergency out-of-hours visits may carry a small surcharge — we'll always confirm pricing before attending.
How long does a consumer unit upgrade take?
A standard consumer unit upgrade typically takes 4–6 hours. We'll need to isolate your power for part of the day. We plan around you and aim to have everything back on before we leave.
Do I need an EICR as a landlord?
Yes — since 1 April 2021 it has been a legal requirement for all private landlords in England to have an EICR carried out every 5 years. We can carry these out and provide the certificate promptly.
Can you install EV chargers at my home?
Yes. We install 7kW and 22kW home EV charging points compatible with all major manufacturers. We'll assess your existing supply capacity and advise on the best solution for your property.
What areas do you cover?
We are based in Warwick CV34 and cover Warwick, Leamington Spa, Kenilworth, Coventry, Stratford-upon-Avon, Solihull, Rugby and surrounding areas across Warwickshire. Not sure if we cover you? Give us a call and we'll confirm.
Do you offer emergency electrical work?
Yes. Where possible we offer same-day and emergency call-outs for urgent faults. Call us directly on 07360 528992 — you'll speak to Alfie, not a call centre.
